content.en:
"Celestial!"

Looking at these two words, Ye Tian's pupils shrank suddenly, and he was extremely shocked.

"I carved out the heavenly realm!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

The quality of the world is from nine to one grade, and there are small thousand worlds, large thousand worlds and heavenly worlds, but even small thousand worlds are the world quality that the children of the universe dream of!

But in fact, the children of the universe who can open up a small thousand realms are as rare as a few and far between.

As for the quality of the Heavenly Realm, Ye Tian had never heard of it.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the quality of the Heavenly Realm is calculated, and any quality that exceeds the limit of the quality of the Great Thousand Realms is the quality of the Heavenly Realm, so it can be tested with the World Bead to test such a World Quality.

"My Chaos Ancient Realm must be a Heavenly Realm quality, but it is definitely not an ordinary Heavenly Realm quality, because the limit of the World Bead Test can only reach the Heavenly Realm quality. Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the blink of an eye, a few more days passed.

this day.

Ye Tian suddenly received a courier!

That's right, it's a courier!

Of course, this is Ye Tian's own name, in the Son of the Universe is called Cosmic Delivery, and a huge company spanning many cosmic clans, the Cosmic Express Group, is responsible for transporting the goods.

The Cosmic Express Group is very mysterious, controlling many cosmic clans and some innate beings, there are many powerhouses at the cosmic god and master level, and the employees responsible for transporting goods have reached the galactic level at the lowest level.

They don't accept small orders, they are basically high-value lists, and they have a good reputation.

And the express delivery received by Ye Tian came from other clans, which made Ye Tian a little surprised.

But soon, he knew who the delivery was coming from.

"It turned out to be His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch of the Protoss!"

Knowing who the poster was, Ye Tian signed for the delivery.

This courier is a box made of special metal, on which the magic circle is sealed, and after Ye Tian signs for it, the magic circle is revealed, and the key to the special metal box is also delivered to Ye Tian by the courier.

"It should be ten origin artifacts, I came out of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm a little late at that time, and the great gods of the Protoss left first. I thought that His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch would play tricks and not give me ten Origin Artifacts. Unexpectedly, he actually sent me ten Origin Artifacts through the Cosmic Express Group!" Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Click!

The metal case opened, revealing ten spatial rings inside.

Immediately, Ye Tian refined these spatial rings one by one, and among each spatial ring there was an origin artifact.

The value of the ten origin artifacts is also quite high, even if Ye Tian can't use them all, leaving it to the Heavenly Pavilion as the treasure of the Town Pavilion is also a good choice.

Putting away these ten origin artifacts, Ye Tian then went through some formalities and left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

From today on, he is no longer a highness in the supreme hall of the human race, but a true monarch of all laws!

......

Tianlan Giant City.

Ye Tian returned to the Heavenly Pavilion and saw his wife Xiao Yue for the first time.

"Yue'er, I have also reached the galaxy level, and I have left the Supreme Hall of the Terrans! Next, I will accompany you for a while longer!" Ye Tian hugged Xiao Yue and said.

"Congratulations, husband!"

Xiao Yue congratulated.

In the following days, Ye Tian spent a lot of time with his wife Xiao Yue, and also vigorously cultivated the members of the Heavenly Pavilion, and spent a lot of resources on the cultivation of the members of the Heavenly Pavilion.

Under Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation, Tiange successfully made rapid progress.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian relied on his amazing talent and a large amount of resources and time acceleration abilities, and finally improved his cultivation to the ninth order peak realm of the galaxy level, and his wife Moon Emperor also raised to the peak realm of the galaxy level.

At the level of galaxy level, there is no division of the children of the universe, even if Ye Tian was the son of the epoch before, and now he is no longer the son of the epoch.

However, the galactic level achieved by the Children of the Era is far more terrifying than others can imagine.

"Galaxy level, I still need to accumulate, although I am very strong now, I am still too weak compared to those cosmic gods, juggernauts, and celestial venerables who defy the sky. The Kungo Supreme suggested that I go to the Divine Blade Alliance to sign up, but I don't need to go right now. I'm making progress every moment now, let's cultivate and accumulate a little bit before I go to the Divine Blade Alliance!"

Ye Tian planned.

Next, Ye Tian focused on cultivating the ninth set of movements and the tenth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques.

The inheritance of the ninth set of actions and the tenth set of actions need to enter the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower of the Terran Supreme Palace, and others can't enter it after leaving the Terran Supreme Palace, but Ye Tian is more special, as long as he applies for it, he can enter the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower of the Terran Supreme Palace.

In addition to the Eighteen Golden Body Formula, Ye Tian also had to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique and the Hades Secret Script.

At the same time, he also needs to comprehend the Creation of the Dao of the Sword and the True Technique of Chaos, as well as the comprehension of the Dao of Chaos.

He has only now mastered the form of the Chaos Dao, and the next realm is the Law Phase, once the Great Dao Law Phase is condensed, it is the real great terror and great power.

But according to Ye Tian's knowledge, all the existences that condensed the Great Dao Law were basically masters, and they were very powerful masters.

But no matter what, he needs to work hard step by step.

Under the frantic cultivation, Ye Tian spent 30 years cultivating the ninth and tenth sets of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, making his physical body extremely terrifying and powerful.

And the cultivation speed of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was much slower, because the glazed golden wave liquid he got from the dragon clan was not enough at all, and he was all exhausted.

And the Dao Peer is also stuck in the supreme level Knife Peer, and it is difficult to progress.

However, the Chaos True Technique has made great progress, Ye Tian has further improved the Chaos True Technique Black Lotus Realm, which is equivalent to a half-step to a high-level Chaos True Technique, and combined the Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique with the Chaos True Technique to create a new Chaos True Technique.

For example, the previous six Chaos Palms, Chaos Yuan Scale Armor, and Chaos Yuan Vines were all perfected by Ye Tian into Chaos True Skills, and their power was even better.

In fact, the so-called Chaos Divine Secret Technique is a crippled Chaos True Technique, but the cultivation civilization of this universe is still relatively weak, and it is not perfect in many aspects.

However, Ye Tian believed that after countless years, the cultivation texts of the various universe clans would definitely be much more perfect.

this day.

Ye Tian began to practice the Hades Secret Codex.

He has now reached the level of the Hades Secret Classic, corresponding to the galaxy level and the galaxy level, and Ye Tian is only in the early stage of the Hades now, and his immortal soul can continue to grow stronger.

But after all, this universe was not suitable for the Soul Dao, so even if Ye Tian had a large amount of soul resources, his progress was very slow.

This is still because Ye Tian broke the rules of the universe and was not controlled by the universe origin, if it was someone else, the speed of progress would be even slower, because of the suppression of the universe origin, others should not want to make great progress in the soul path.

As all aspects gradually fell into a bottleneck, it was very difficult for Ye Tian to make rapid progress, and cultivating with his head covered was undoubtedly not a good way, he needed to find new opportunities.

"It's time to go to the Divine Blade Alliance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
